items.claim: Alden Cora is a more technical and smoother boxer than Costa.
items.quote: He's a better boxer than Costa, more technical, a little bit smoother.

items.claim: Nickel's wrestling and jiu-jitsu are decent.
items.quote: His his wrestling is is is decent. His jiu-jitsu game is decent.

items.claim: Levi Rodriguez Jr. has crazy power.
items.quote: The X factor in this fight is the fact that Rodriguez has crazy power.

items.claim: Levi Rodriguez Jr. previously failed a drug test.
Felipe Franco is more technical than Levi Rodriguez Jr. overall as a fighter.
items.quote: I think that Franco, even though he could be kind of inactive in these fights and and be a little bit too patient, not do a whole lot, get held up against the fence, not really show a ton of urgency, I think he's more technical than Rodriguez overall as a fighter.

items.claim: Felipe Franco is a better grappler than Levi Rodriguez Jr.
items.quote: And I think that Franco is probably the better grappler.

items.claim: Jean Paul Labosani has a solid grappling game.
items.quote: He's got a solid grappling game.
